title: Eventful Platform
description: Full-stack event ticketing platform with QR code generation, Paystack payment integration, attendee management, analytics dashboard, and email notifications. Deployed on AWS EC2.

title: Wallet Service
description: Secure wallet service with Paystack deposit integration, wallet-to-wallet transfers, Google OAuth authentication, API key management, and comprehensive Swagger documentation. Deployed on Azure with CI/CD.

title: SchoolBase Backend API
description: Multi-platform educational portal API with authentication, tenant-specific configurations, and role-based access control. Open source contribution during HNG Internship.

title: GitHub Issue Monitor
description: Real-time monitoring tool for tracking GitHub repository activities, issues, pull requests, and commits with Telegram bot integration for instant notifications.

title: Restaurant Chatbot
description: Intelligent chatbot for restaurant order management with conversational UI, menu browsing, and order tracking capabilities.

title: Birthday Reminder App
description: Birthday management application with full CRUD operations for birthday records, automated reminders, and notification scheduling.
